text: Now let me analyze this carefully.

function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "commit", "action_id": "dispatch_backup", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": 1.5, "adjustment_reasons": ["Coherent cascade of 7 events across 5 distinct sensor types (motion, thermal, door, plate, radio, panic, geofence) tells a compelling story of a breach", "Panic button + forced door + radio flag + geofence exit = guard in distress scenario with multiple corroborating signals", "No precedents means no learned bias toward false alarms — weak hand-set priors are easily outweighed by strong multi-source evidence"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.97, "what_would_change_my_mind": "If radio transcript review or robot video shows the panic was a test/mistake and the forced door was maintenance, I'd downgrade to E2/E3 and investigate further. A guard check-in confirming everyone is safe would immediately reduce severity."}
